Name: Lamborghini
1Q: In wich small town 1963 Ferruccio Lamborghini founded Automobili Lamborghini S.p.A?
tip1: Ferruccio Lamborghini was an appreciated Italian industrialist and manufacturing magnate.
2Q: For what was Lamborghini specialized before it began to make cars?
tip2: After Lamborghini sold off many of his interests by the late 1970s and retire, he was engaged in winemaking.
3Q: Which Lamborghini became the fastest production road car in the world at that time?
tip3: Lamborghini Miura was the first supercar with a rear mid-engine and two-seat layout.
4Q: On which Lamborghini for the first time appears famous Lambo doors?
tip4: Italian Design house Bertone with Countach popularized the sharply angled and cab-forward design languages.
5Q: Which manufacturer has an exclusive contract to supply new Lamborghinis with tires?
tip5: In 2015 Lamborghini and Pirelli were celebrating a partnership with a special Lamborghini Aventador Pirelli Edition LP700-4.
6Q: Which of these cars does not have a V12 engine?
tip6: The V10 powered Gallardo has been Lamborghini's bestseller with many special editions during the years.
7Q: Which Lamborghini concept car has only one seat?
tip7: Translation of the Egoista literally means selfish.
8Q: Which is the first Lamborghini concept car with hybrid technology?
tip8: Asterion is named after a Minotaur, keeping tradition of naming the cars after bulls while alluding to its usage of hybrid technology.
9Q: Which edition of Lamborghini Aventador does not exist?
tip9: The Superleggera mark is reserved for the Lamborghini Gallardo.
10Q: How is named Lamborghini's first Super Sport Utility Vehicle?
tip10: Urus is powered by 4.0L twin-turbocharged V8 engine.
